productDisplayName: French Connection Men Cream Striped T-shirt
description: Style Notefrench connection tees indulge in a minimalist uncomplicated aesthetic. Layer this under a tailored blazer and fitted chinos, or for a pared down look, we recommend a fitted pair of denims with no distressing or wash. Style this with low top shoes without socks for maximum effect. Product DetailsCream coloured T-shirt, has black stripes with alternate teal and red accents, slim ribbed cutaway buttoned down teal tipped collar, three button placket, embroidered design on the left chest, brand tag above the hemline, back yoke and a vented hemlineMaterial and care100% cottonMachine wash coldDo not bleach or tumble dryUse cool ironSize and FitRegular FitThe model (height 6' and shoulders 18") is wearing a size M
